trans-unit.source: This requests cancellation of the cached Azure deployment for this resource. Any Azure resources already created by the deployment are not deleted. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: This requests cancellation of the cached Azure deployment for this resource. Any Azure resources already created by the deployment are not deleted. Do you want to continue?

trans-unit.source: Requests cancellation of the cached Azure deployment for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Requests cancellation of the cached Azure deployment for this resource.

trans-unit.source: This updates the Azure context for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources using the values you enter next.
trans-unit.target: This updates the Azure context for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources using the values you enter next.

trans-unit.source: Updates the Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, or location for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources.
trans-unit.target: Updates the Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, or location for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources.

trans-unit.source: Azure context updated and resources reprovisioned.
trans-unit.target: Azure context updated and resources reprovisioned.

trans-unit.source: Overrides the Azure location for this resource and reprovisions it using that location.
trans-unit.target: Overrides the Azure location for this resource and reprovisions it using that location.

trans-unit.source: Azure resource location updated and reprovisioning completed.
trans-unit.target: Azure resource location updated and reprovisioning completed.

trans-unit.source: Select or enter a new Azure location for '{0}'. The resource will then be reprovisioned using that location.
trans-unit.target: Select or enter a new Azure location for '{0}'. The resource will then be reprovisioned using that location.

trans-unit.source: This cancels the cached Azure deployment, deletes Azure resources targeted by this resource's deployment, and clears cached deployment state. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: This cancels the cached Azure deployment, deletes Azure resources targeted by this resource's deployment, and clears cached deployment state. Do you want to continue?

trans-unit.source: Cancels the cached Azure deployment, deletes Azure resources targeted by the deployment, and clears cached deployment state for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Cancels the cached Azure deployment, deletes Azure resources targeted by the deployment, and clears cached deployment state for this resource.

trans-unit.source: Azure resources deleted and provisioning state reset.
trans-unit.target: Azure resources deleted and provisioning state reset.

trans-unit.source: This deletes the current Azure resource group and every Azure resource inside it for this AppHost, then clears the cached deployment state. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: This deletes the current Azure resource group and every Azure resource inside it for this AppHost, then clears the cached deployment state. Do you want to continue?

trans-unit.source: Deletes the current Azure resource group for this AppHost, clears cached deployment state, and leaves the Azure context intact for reprovisioning.
trans-unit.target: Deletes the current Azure resource group for this AppHost, clears cached deployment state, and leaves the Azure context intact for reprovisioning.

trans-unit.source: Azure resources deleted and provisioning state reset.
trans-unit.target: Azure resources deleted and provisioning state reset.

trans-unit.source: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and resets its provisioning snapshot.
trans-unit.target: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and resets its provisioning snapshot.

trans-unit.source: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource so it can be provisioned again using the current Azure context.
trans-unit.target: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource so it can be provisioned again using the current Azure context.

trans-unit.source: Returns cached deployment state and live Azure existence information for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Returns cached deployment state and live Azure existence information for this resource.

trans-unit.source:
Select the Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, and location Aspire should use for provisioning.
To learn more, see the [Azure provisioning docs](https://aka.ms/aspire/azure/provisioning).
trans-unit.target:
Il modello contiene risorse di Azure che richiedono una sottoscrizione di Azure.
Per altre informazioni, vedere la [documentazione sul provisioning di Azure](https://aka.ms/aspire/azure/provisioning).
Posizione e gruppo di risorse di Azure

trans-unit.source: Select your Azure location and specify resource group:
trans-unit.target: Selezionare la posizione di Azure e specificare il gruppo di risorse:

trans-unit.source: The model contains Azure resources that require an Azure Subscription.
trans-unit.target: Il modello contiene risorse di Azure che richiedono una sottoscrizione di Azure.

trans-unit.source: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources again using the current Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, and location.
trans-unit.target: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this AppHost and reprovisions all Azure resources again using the current Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, and location.

trans-unit.source: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this AppHost and provisions all Azure resources again using the current Azure context.
trans-unit.target: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this AppHost and provisions all Azure resources again using the current Azure context.

trans-unit.source: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and reprovisions it again using the current Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, and location.
trans-unit.target: This clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and reprovisions it again using the current Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, and location.

trans-unit.source: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and provisions it again using the current Azure context.
trans-unit.target: Clears the cached Azure deployment state for this resource and provisions it again using the current Azure context.

trans-unit.source: This only clears the cached Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, location, and deployment state stored for this AppHost. Live Azure resources are not deleted and may be left orphaned. Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.target: This only clears the cached Azure tenant, subscription, resource group, location, and deployment state stored for this AppHost. Live Azure resources are not deleted and may be left orphaned. Do you want to continue?

trans-unit.source: Clears the cached Azure context and deployment state for this AppHost. This does not delete live Azure resources and may leave them orphaned.
trans-unit.target: Clears the cached Azure context and deployment state for this AppHost. This does not delete live Azure resources and may leave them orphaned.
Selezionare o immettere un gruppo di risorse

trans-unit.source: Select your Azure resource group or enter a new name:
trans-unit.target: Selezionare il gruppo di risorse di Azure o immettere un nuovo nome:

trans-unit.source: Resource group name must be a valid Azure resource group name.
trans-unit.target: Il nome del gruppo di risorse deve essere un nome valido per un gruppo di risorse di Azure.

trans-unit.source: Subscription ID must be a valid GUID.
trans-unit.target: L'ID sottoscrizione deve essere un GUID valido.

trans-unit.source: Tenant ID must be a valid GUID.
trans-unit.target: L'ID tenant deve essere un GUID valido.
